item.title:
AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 59s "She's taken everything in her stride!"
Argentine Tango makes her seasonal reappearance
item.description:
At The Races @AtTheRaces · 59s "She's taken everything in her stride!"
Argentine Tango makes her seasonal reappearance in the Group Three Prix Sigy at Chantilly this afternoon and @WilliamEasterby joined the channel to preview her chances... 3:10 27

item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 11min Grade 1-winning trainer Micky Hammond has been given a six-month ban, suspended for 12 m
item.description: Racing Post @RacingPost · 11min Grade 1-winning trainer Micky Hammond has been given a six-month ban, suspended for 12 months, and hit with an £8,000 fine after three of his runners tested positive for a banned raceday substance in the space of a month De racingpost.com 1 4 5 6 2 mil

item.title:

Check out the X page by clicking below De x.c
